footer.statement: An engineering-notes record of the systems I build and run.

a11y.schematicLabel: Microservices topology diagram: requests flow from web and app clients through Nginx into services such as Auth, Member, Product, Order and Inventory, backed by MySQL and Redis

home.name: binbin
home.intro: Since June 2025 I've been working on an AI nail platform and a multi-tenant HRIS at Rissiu Aesthetics Co., Ltd. Outside work, I independently built and now run two systems in daily use at NKUST. This site records how these systems were designed — the trade-offs made and the lessons learned — in the form of engineering notes.
home.schematicCaption: Simplified view: the microservice topology I work on day to day — every node is a real service.
home.workNote: Each system is documented in the same format: problem, constraints, architecture, challenges, results.
home.archNote: Microservice boundaries, API request lifecycles and deployment flow, organized as diagrams.
home.principlesNote: A few principles these projects kept proving true.
home.contactNote: If you'd like to talk about system design or backend work, email me.

work.title: Work
work.description: Every project is broken down the same way: problem, constraints, architecture, trade-offs, results.

meta.home: Full-stack developer building an AI nail platform and a multi-tenant HRIS at Rissiu Aesthetics, and independently running two systems in production at NKUST.
meta.work: Deep teardowns of five real systems: multi-tenant SaaS, an AI commerce platform, a mobile app and campus operations systems.
meta.architecture: Interactive views of microservice boundaries, API request lifecycles and deployment flow.
meta.ai: How AI agents assist architecture review, code review, security and performance checks, and documentation.
meta.about: A student independently shipping production systems — experience, timeline and stack.

common.underConstruction: This page is under construction — full content coming soon.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm binbin — still a student, and since June 2025 a backend developer at Rissiu Aesthetics Co., Ltd., where I build the AI nail platform and the dozens of Django microservices behind it.
about.p2: I care less about titles than about system boundaries, data flow, and the trade-offs behind every technical decision. This site documents what I've actually built, in the format of an engineering specification.
